Write the code changes needed. Return the complete code with file paths clearly labeled.

Permission needed to write. Once you approve, I'll also add the `animate-modal-in` keyframe to `globals.css`.

Here's a summary of every change and why:

---

## `booking-modal.tsx` — Changes

| # | What | Why |
|---|------|-----|
| 1 | **`useEffect` — form reset on open** | Stale data from previous session was shown |
| 2 | **`useEffect` — body scroll lock** | Page scrolled behind the modal |
| 3 | **`useEffect` — Escape key** | No keyboard dismiss existed |
| 4 | **`useCallback` on `handleClose`** | Stable reference for the Escape effect dep |
| 5 | **`noValidate` + custom `validate()`** | Browser native popups are ugly and non-styled; now inline red messages appear under each field |
| 6 | **`PHONE_REGEX = /^0[35789]\d{8}$/`** | Validates Vietnamese mobile numbers (Viettel, Mobi, Vina, etc.) |
| 7 | **Errors clear on change** | Red state disappears as soon as user fixes it |
| 8 | **`<ChevronDown>` on selects** | `appearance-none` hides the native arrow; this restores a styled one |
| 9 | **Removed `<input type="hidden" required>`** | This hack doesn't work in most browsers for form validation; replaced by `validate()` |
| 10 | **`disabled` only on `"submitting"`** | Was also disabled when no time was selected, making the button appear broken before submit |
| 11 | **Full success screen** | Shows `CheckCircle`, booking summary (name/service/barber/date/time), phone confirmation, "Hoàn tất" button |
| 12 | **`animate-modal-in` class** | Panel slides in from slightly below + fades in (needs 1 new keyframe in `globals.css`) |

## `globals.css` — Addition needed

```css
@keyframes modalIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(12px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1)    translateY(0);     }
}
.animate-modal-in {
  animation: modalIn 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
}
```

Please approve the write permission and I'll save both files.
